title: Making clickable links + quantities in a printing request form
excerpt:
How can I set up a Printing Request form so that users can submit clickable links along with specifying a quantity for each link—and have that information appear clearly in the submitted task? 
Thanks in advance …

posts.author: Ania1 (Ania)
posts.cookedHtml:
How can I set up a Printing Request form so that users can submit clickable links along with specifying a quantity for each link—and have that information appear clearly in the submitted task?
Thanks in advance

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Do you need an unlimited amount of these links?

posts.author: Ania1 (Ania)
posts.cookedHtml: Unlimited would be ideal, but looking for a range of up to approximately 25 links

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Are they providing the links or are these links you’re providing them where they’re just giving you a qty?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Got it! All you’ll need to do is activate the ‘Subitems’ on the Form. Then you can hide any subitem columns they wouldn’t need to fill out.

image834×570 20.8 KB

This is what it would look like from the customer perspective

image578×503 10.5 KB

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: Ania1 (Ania)
posts.cookedHtml: This worked perfectly- thank you so much!!

posts.author: Ania1 (Ania)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m having issues with this once more, unfortunately. When I create a subitem in a new form, I can no longer add or change the columns (i.e. add “Link” option). Not sure if something has changed on the backend, as this wasn’t an issue prior to the new “beta” tag. I’m also unable to delete the subitem now from my new form, despite there being no submissions on the main board view.

posts.author: Ania1 (Ania)
posts.cookedHtml: Still having issues- the previous solution no longer is working for me. Please assist at your earliest convenience
